title: [YTP] Pooping the Charts, Vol. 1990s:  PO(O)P ROCK CHAOS!
description:
Ah yes here we are, another Pooping the Charts at long last!  Featuring the likes of LiL, GreerG DaD, WeezeeW, and SpapS HoH.  A perfect piece of pop punk pandemonium.

Big thanks to Anno for using AI to source decent quality instrumental & vocal separation of the songs for me to use!  Originally half of these songs did not have decent quality stems uploaded anywhere.

-------------------------------------------------

»»»  SupporoppuS me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/cs188
»»»  All my other crappy content & social links: https://linktr.ee/cs188
